subcodes.first_line: O spirit enraptured by the Beauty of the Self-Subsisting, in this world of upheaval where in every head there dwelleth a desire and in every heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جان مفتون جمال قیوم در این جهان پرانقلاب که در هر سری هوسی و در هر دلی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @love of God, @love as fire, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
